title: nophek #5306
definition:
1) a precious stone in the high priest's breastplate
    1a) perhaps an emerald, turquoise, ruby, or carbuncle
 2) jewels imported from Tyre
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a precious stone in the high priest's breastplate
    1a) perhaps an emerald, turquoise, ruby, or carbuncle
 2) jewels imported from Tyre
